examples: He started paring down his material life, selling off his condo in New York, his mansion in Florida and his only car.
Is there any use in paring down thinking?
She was paring an apple with a knife when I came in.
Boston quickly caught up, paring back some of Toronto's momentum midway into the period.
Bharti shares rose as much as 4.7 percent after the news before paring some gains.
